## Summary

Adds a focused runtime implementation plan for Quality Review Permission.

## Scope

Docs only. Defines implementation lanes for:

- account-level setting
- Account Settings privacy UI
- Evaluation status display
- Revise Queue status display
- admin/support access guard
- content-free telemetry
- no training-framed Revise Queue copy
